# IncubationPeriodModels

`IncubationPeriodModels` implements flexible Burr-family distributions
for modelling incubation periods and other epidemiological delay
distributions.

The package provides density, distribution, quantile, and random
generation functions for several Burr-family distributions and a derived
Burr-like distribution. These models offer flexible parametric
representations of positive-valued event times and can accommodate a
wide range of skewness, tail behaviour, and hazard shapes.

Such flexibility makes Burr distributions useful for modelling
incubation periods and other delay distributions encountered in
epidemiology where heavy tails and asymmetric shapes are common.

## Implemented distributions

The package currently provides implementations of:

- Burr Type III
- Burr Type X
- Burr Type XII
- Derived Burr distribution

All distributions follow the standard R distribution interface:

| Function | Purpose                 |
|----------|-------------------------|
| `d*`     | density                 |
| `p*`     | cumulative distribution |
| `q*`     | quantile                |
| `r*`     | random generation       |

## Installation

Install the development version from GitHub:

\`\`\`r \# install.packages(“pak”)
pak::pak(“NyallJamieson/IncubationPeriodModels”)

# Package index

## Distribution functions

- [`dburr10()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr10.md)
  [`pburr10()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr10.md)
  [`qburr10()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr10.md)
  [`rburr10()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr10.md)
  : Burr type X distribution
- [`dburr12()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr12.md)
  [`pburr12()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr12.md)
  [`qburr12()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr12.md)
  [`rburr12()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr12.md)
  : Burr type XII distribution
- [`dburr3()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr3.md)
  [`pburr3()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr3.md)
  [`qburr3()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr3.md)
  [`rburr3()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burr3.md)
  : Burr type III distribution
- [`dburrNEW()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burrNEW.md)
  [`pburrNEW()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burrNEW.md)
  [`qburrNEW()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burrNEW.md)
  [`rburrNEW()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burrNEW.md)
  : Derived Burr-like distribution

## Summary statistics

- [`meanburr10()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/meanburr10.md)
  : Mean of the Burr type X distribution
- [`meanburr12()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/meanburr12.md)
  : Mean of the Burr type XII distribution
- [`meanburr3()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/meanburr3.md)
  : Mean of the Burr type III distribution
- [`meanburrNEW()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/meanburrNEW.md)
  : Mean of the derived Burr-like distribution
- [`varburr10()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/varburr10.md)
  : Variance of the Burr type X distribution
- [`varburr12()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/varburr12.md)
  : Variance of the Burr type XII distribution
- [`varburr3()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/varburr3.md)
  : Variance of the Burr type III distribution
- [`varburrNEW()`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/varburrNEW.md)
  : Variance of the derived Burr-like distribution

## Utilities

- [`burrdist`](https://nyalljamieson.github.io/IncubationPeriodModels/reference/burrdist.md)
  : Burr distributions (Type III, X, XII) and a derived Burr-like
  distribution
